candidates.name: ai-cats API
candidates.tagline: The ai-cats API provides access to various functionalities related to AI and cat
candidates.description: The ai-cats API provides access to various functionalities related to AI and cat management, offering features such as training, health monitoring, and interaction tracking. Users can utilize this API to integrate intelligent cat care solutions into their applications.

candidates.name: Weather Data API
candidates.tagline: This API provides weather data, including current conditions, forecasts, and his
candidates.description: This API provides weather data, including current conditions, forecasts, and historical weather information. It allows users to access weather information for various locations worldwide.

candidates.name: Exchange Rate API
candidates.tagline: ExchangeRate-API provides a free and open-access API for real-time currency conv
candidates.description: ExchangeRate-API provides a free and open-access API for real-time currency conversion and exchange rate data without the need for an API key. It supports various currency pairs and allows users to obtain current and historical exchange rates for personal or commercial use, subject to terms of attribution and rate limits.

candidates.name: User Data Scraper
candidates.tagline: This API allows users to scrape and retrieve user data from various online sourc
candidates.description: This API allows users to scrape and retrieve user data from various online sources. It gathers a wide range of user information including names, addresses, phone numbers, and more, which can be utilized for various applications and analytics.

candidates.name: HTML to PDF Converter
candidates.tagline: This API allows users to convert any HTML source code into a downloadable PDF fi
candidates.description: This API allows users to convert any HTML source code into a downloadable PDF file. It is a free service that requires no authentication and can be easily integrated into applications using a simple HTTP POST request.

candidates.name: Exchange Rates API
candidates.tagline: The Exchange Rates API is a developer-friendly data service providing official R
candidates.description: The Exchange Rates API is a developer-friendly data service providing official Reserve Bank of Australia (RBA) exchange rate data through clean, modern REST API endpoints. We transform publicly available RBA data into instant JSON responses.

candidates.name: NID Application System
candidates.tagline: The Bangladesh NID Application System API allows users to register for a nationa
candidates.description: The Bangladesh NID Application System API allows users to register for a national identity card, claim their accounts, and manage related services through a web-based platform. It provides functionalities for document uploads and information retrieval while ensuring user authentication and approval processes.

candidates.name: API Error Handler
candidates.tagline: This API is designed to manage and provide standardized responses for different
candidates.description: This API is designed to manage and provide standardized responses for different error scenarios encountered during API calls. It ensures that error messages are consistent and useful for end-users and developers alike.

candidates.name: AmiiboAPI
candidates.tagline: A RESTful API for Amiibo providing information on different amiibos, types, game
candidates.description: A RESTful API for Amiibo providing information on different amiibos, types, game series, characters, and more. It is primarily used for educational purposes and allows reading-only access with no authentication required.

candidates.name: UniRate API
candidates.tagline: API for currency conversion and exchange rates. It provides endpoints to convert
candidates.description: API for currency conversion and exchange rates. It provides endpoints to convert currencies, list available currencies, and retrieve current exchange rates for various currencies.

candidates.name: BIZ FACTORY
candidates.tagline: BIZ FACTORY is a Telegram group dedicated to sharing paid methods, APIs, tricks,
candidates.description: BIZ FACTORY is a Telegram group dedicated to sharing paid methods, APIs, tricks, scripts, and coding resources. Members can access various premium tools and information for free. Join to enhance your skills and discover valuable resources.

candidates.name: osu! beatmap API
candidates.tagline: Search, discover, and download osu! beatmaps effortlessly.
candidates.description: Search, discover, and download osu! beatmaps effortlessly.

candidates.name: Dutch Customer Data API
candidates.tagline: Verify and standardize Dutch customer and business data, including addresses, ph
candidates.description: Verify and standardize Dutch customer and business data, including addresses, phone numbers, emails, URLs, VAT, IBAN, Chamber of Commerce (KvK) numbers, and postal codes.

candidates.name: Sumo API
candidates.tagline: Free API for accessing sumo database including rikishi, basho, banzuke, torikumi
candidates.description: Free API for accessing sumo database including rikishi, basho, banzuke, torikumi, hoshitori, matches, and more. Explore sumo data, learn about sumo history, and check match results.

candidates.name: civicAPI
candidates.tagline: civicAPI is a free API that provides real-time election results, polling data, a
candidates.description: civicAPI is a free API that provides real-time election results, polling data, and general election information. It's open to the public and does not require authentication, serving both personal and commercial needs with appropriate attribution.

candidates.name: Tempmail API
candidates.tagline: The Tempmail API provides users with disposable email addresses that can be used
candidates.description: The Tempmail API provides users with disposable email addresses that can be used for temporary registrations or verifications. It allows users to manage their temporary inboxes, retrieve emails, and perform various email-related operations securely and anonymously.

candidates.name: Profanity Checker API
candidates.tagline: Check text for profanity (filter out bad words)
candidates.description: Check text for profanity (filter out bad words)

candidates.name: Temporary Email Service
candidates.tagline: This API allows users to generate temporary email addresses for receiving emails
candidates.description: This API allows users to generate temporary email addresses for receiving emails anonymously. It helps in protecting user privacy while signing up for online services without exposing personal email accounts.

candidates.name: Telegram Bot API
candidates.tagline: The Bot API is an HTTP-based interface created for developers keen on building b
candidates.description: The Bot API is an HTTP-based interface created for developers keen on building bots for Telegram.

candidates.name: MediaWiki Action API
candidates.tagline: A web service providing access to wiki features like authentication, page operat
candidates.description: A web service providing access to wiki features like authentication, page operations, and search. It offers meta information about the wiki and logged-in user.

candidates.name: Free Sports API
candidates.tagline: Provides free JSON sports API for accessing basic sports data, including informa
candidates.description: Provides free JSON sports API for accessing basic sports data, including information on teams, players, events, and more. Offers test API keys, API limits, and upgrade options for premium features.

candidates.name: Free Meal API
candidates.tagline: Provides access to a free recipe API with features like searching meals by name,
candidates.description: Provides access to a free recipe API with features like searching meals by name, listing meals by first letter, looking up meal details by ID, and more. Supports JSON format data retrieval.

candidates.name: World Bank Data API
candidates.tagline: The World Bank Data API provides access to a wide array of economic, financial,
candidates.description: The World Bank Data API provides access to a wide array of economic, financial, and social data from over 200 countries. It allows developers to integrate World Bank datasets into their applications and services, facilitating data-driven decision-making for research and policy development.

candidates.name: The Cat API
candidates.tagline: Get random images of cats
candidates.description: Get random images of cats

candidates.name: Pollinations AI
candidates.tagline: Pollinations AI is an open-source platform providing simple text and image gener
candidates.description: Pollinations AI is an open-source platform providing simple text and image generation APIs without the need for sign-ups or API keys. It emphasizes user privacy and encourages creative exploration with AI-generated content.

candidates.name: Dragon Ball API
candidates.tagline: The Dragon Ball API provides comprehensive information about characters, transfo
candidates.description: The Dragon Ball API provides comprehensive information about characters, transformations, power stats, planets, and locations from the Dragon Ball universe. It allows users to retrieve data through various endpoints for easy integration into applications or services.

candidates.name: 7Timer Weather API
candidates.tagline: The 7Timer Weather API provides global numerical weather forecasts derived from
candidates.description: The 7Timer Weather API provides global numerical weather forecasts derived from high-resolution models. Users can access weather data in graphical or machine-readable formats without needing an API key, enabling programmatic access to various meteorological elements.

candidates.name: Cat Fact API
candidates.tagline: An API that shows different Cat Facts!
candidates.description: An API that shows different Cat Facts!

candidates.name: Railway Station Photos
candidates.tagline: OpenData project to collect railway station photos from many countries. More and
candidates.description:
OpenData project to collect railway station photos from many countries. More and more countries are added over time. Most photos are CC0 licensed and can be used freely.
The railway stations with their photos can also be viewed on the website https://map.railway-stations.org and in the Android and iOS Apps. These apps also implement the API and can be examined on GitHub: https://github.com/RailwayStations
The full OpenAPI Spec can be found here: https://api.railway-stations.org/openapi.yaml

candidates.name: Forex Trading API
candidates.tagline: The Forex Trading API allows users to access the foreign exchange market for tra
candidates.description: The Forex Trading API allows users to access the foreign exchange market for trading currencies and precious metals. It facilitates trading over 80 currency pairs with comprehensive trading options and insights into market performance.

candidates.name: Aare.guru API
candidates.tagline: Public API for Aare river data including temperature, flow rate, weather forecas
candidates.description: Public API for Aare river data including temperature, flow rate, weather forecasts, and more. Non-commercial use allowed with customizable app and version parameters.

candidates.name: Met Museum Collection
candidates.tagline: Access over 470,000 artworks with metadata and high-resolution images from The M
candidates.description: Access over 470,000 artworks with metadata and high-resolution images from The Metropolitan Museum of Art Collection. Search by title, tags, department, and more. No API key required.

candidates.name: Tarot Card Meanings
candidates.tagline: Card names, descriptions, and divinatory meanings based on AE Waite's Pictorial
candidates.description: Card names, descriptions, and divinatory meanings based on AE Waite's Pictorial Key to the Tarot (1910) for the Rider-Waite-Smith deck. Access via REST API with endpoints for getting cards and documentation.

candidates.name: Give Food API
candidates.tagline: This API provides access to the largest public database of food banks in the UK,
candidates.description: This API provides access to the largest public database of food banks in the UK, including details about their locations and the items they need donated. Users can retrieve this data in various formats such as JSON, GeoJSON, XML, or YAML, facilitating numerous applications in addressing food insecurity.

candidates.name: Attack on Titan API
candidates.tagline: A RESTful API that provides access to a wide range of data related to the popula
candidates.description: A RESTful API that provides access to a wide range of data related to the popular anime and manga series 'Attack on Titan'. Users can retrieve information about characters, episodes, locations, organizations, and titans, making it a valuable resource for fans and developers alike.

candidates.name: Nominatim API
candidates.tagline: The Nominatim API is a web service for searching OpenStreetMap (OSM) objects bas
candidates.description: The Nominatim API is a web service for searching OpenStreetMap (OSM) objects based on their name or type. It provides various endpoints for searching, reverse geocoding, address lookup, and server status inquiries, catering to different needs of developers and users.

candidates.name: Flyff Game API
candidates.tagline: All Game Data from Flyff
candidates.description: All Game Data from Flyff

candidates.name: Quotes API
candidates.tagline: The Quotes API provides access to a collection of motivational quotes. Users can
candidates.description: The Quotes API provides access to a collection of motivational quotes. Users can retrieve all quotes, a random quote, multiple random quotes, or a specific quote by index.

candidates.name: Hypixel API
candidates.tagline: Official Hypixel API documentation for accessing player data, game information,
candidates.description: Official Hypixel API documentation for accessing player data, game information, resources, and more. Requires API key for authentication and has rate limits for requests.

candidates.name: IP Geo Currency API
candidates.tagline: This API provides geolocation information and currency data based on a user's IP
candidates.description: This API provides geolocation information and currency data based on a user's IP address. It allows developers to retrieve IP details such as country, city, and currency exchange rates through simple HTTP requests.

candidates.name: Math Function Parser
candidates.tagline: This API provides functionalities to parse and resolve mathematical expressions.
candidates.description: This API provides functionalities to parse and resolve mathematical expressions. It includes endpoints to tokenize expressions, resolve them, and return their abstract syntax tree (AST).

candidates.name: Pony API
candidates.tagline: The Pony API provides access to detailed information about characters, episodes,
candidates.description: The Pony API provides access to detailed information about characters, episodes, songs, and comics from the animated series My Little Pony: Friendship is Magic. This RESTful API allows users to search for data by various attributes, making it an essential tool for fans and developers alike.

candidates.name: Fortnite API
candidates.tagline: The Fortnite API provides a wealth of data related to the popular battle royale
candidates.description: The Fortnite API provides a wealth of data related to the popular battle royale game, including player statistics, cosmetics, daily shop items, news updates, and various game modes. It is updated automatically with each game patch to ensure the information is current and accurate, making it an essential resource for developers and gamers alike.

candidates.name: Dólar y Monedas API
candidates.tagline: Este API proporciona información sobre el precio del Dólar Oficial, Dólar Blue,
candidates.description: Este API proporciona información sobre el precio del Dólar Oficial, Dólar Blue, Dólar Bolsa, Dólar CCL, Dólar Mayorista y otras monedas en países de América del Sur como Argentina, Chile, Venezuela y Uruguay. Permite obtener cotizaciones actuales y datos históricos sobre estas divisas importantes.

candidates.name: Radio SRF 1
candidates.tagline: API providing information about currently played music on Radio SRF 1 including
candidates.description: API providing information about currently played music on Radio SRF 1 including song titles and artists.

candidates.name: Autobahn API (DE)
candidates.tagline: OpenAPI Documentation for Autobahn GmbH's Autobahn API.
candidates.description: OpenAPI Documentation for Autobahn GmbH's Autobahn API.

candidates.name: ListenFree API
candidates.tagline: ListenFree API provides a platform for fast, ad-free music streaming, allowing u
candidates.description: ListenFree API provides a platform for fast, ad-free music streaming, allowing users to create smart playlists, enjoy collaborative listening rooms, and access video previews of songs. The API supports offline playback and prioritizes user privacy, making it a reliable choice for music enthusiasts.

candidates.name: RuneScape APIs
candidates.tagline: Access comprehensive data from RuneScape with various APIs, including the Bestia
candidates.description: Access comprehensive data from RuneScape with various APIs, including the Bestiary API, Grand Exchange Database API, and Hiscores APIs. These APIs allow developers, fansite operators, and bots to retrieve detailed information about the game, including player statistics, item data, NPCs, and more. Note that most RuneScape APIs require backend calls due to CORS restrictions but can be accessed via Chrome extensions.

candidates.name: World Cup Qualification
candidates.tagline: This API provides detailed information about the qualification process for the F
candidates.description: This API provides detailed information about the qualification process for the FIFA World Cup for different confederations around the world. It includes tournament structures, match schedules, and results for qualifying matches.

candidates.name: Homepage Screenshot API
candidates.tagline: This API provides fast and efficient screenshots of specified web pages. Users c
candidates.description: This API provides fast and efficient screenshots of specified web pages. Users can request screenshots for various dates, sizes, and formats, making it ideal for web monitoring and analysis.
